# Carrgo Freight Solutions

> Trusted UK & Ireland freight forwarder — sea, air, road, rail & customs clearance. All-inclusive door-to-door shipping quotes in 2 hours. BIFA & IATA accredited.

## About Carrgo

Carrgo Freight Solutions Ltd is an independent UK & Ireland freight forwarding company providing importers and exporters with reliable, transparent logistics services. We specialise in sea freight (FCL & LCL), air cargo, European road haulage, China-UK rail freight, and customs brokerage.

Our mission is to remove the friction from international shipping by offering all-inclusive pricing, proactive communication, and hands-on customs support. We are accredited by the British International Freight Association (BIFA) and the International Air Transport Association (IATA).

## Services

### [Sea Freight UK](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/sea-freight)
FCL (20ft/40ft) and LCL container shipping from China, India, USA, UAE, Turkey, Germany, Netherlands, Spain and worldwide to UK ports including Felixstowe, Southampton, London Gateway and Liverpool. Irish Sea services to Belfast and Dublin.

### [Air Freight UK](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/air-freight)
Express and economy air cargo from all major airports worldwide to London Heathrow, East Midlands, Manchester and Glasgow. Onward delivery to Ireland and Northern Ireland.

### [Road Freight UK to Europe](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/road-freight)
FTL and LTL European road haulage from Germany, Netherlands, France, Spain, Italy and Belgium to the UK. T1 transit for Ireland and T2 transit for Northern Ireland.

### [Rail Freight China to UK](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/rail-freight-china-uk)
China to UK via New Silk Road — Yiwu, Xi'an, Zhengzhou, Chongqing to London. Transit time 14-20 days, approximately 40% cheaper than air freight.

### [Customs Clearance UK](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/customs-clearance)
UK and Ireland import/export customs declarations, commodity code classification, duty and VAT calculations, EORI registration assistance. Northern Ireland Protocol and Windsor Framework expertise.

### [Door-to-Door Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/door-to-door)
Complete factory-to-warehouse forwarding including collection, freight, customs and final delivery. Single point of contact throughout.

### [Amazon FBA Freight UK](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/amazon-fba-freight)
FBA-compliant shipping, prep, labelling and delivery to UK fulfilment centres including BHX4, EMA1, LBA1 and GLA1.

### [Warehousing UK](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/services/warehousing)
Midlands-based storage, pick and pack, palletisation, labelling and bonded warehousing.

## Trade Routes

### [China to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/china-to-uk)
Sea: 25-35 days | Air: 3-5 days | Rail: 14-20 days
Origin: Shanghai, Shenzhen, Ningbo, Guangzhou, Qingdao
UK arrival: Felixstowe, Southampton, London Gateway

### [Germany to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/germany-to-uk)
Road: 2-4 days | Sea: 5-8 days | Air: 1-2 days
Origin: Hamburg, Duisburg, Frankfurt, Munich, Stuttgart

### [Netherlands to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/netherlands-to-uk)
Road: 1-3 days | Sea: 3-5 days | Air: 1 day
Origin: Rotterdam, Amsterdam. Direct Rotterdam-Dublin ferry also available.

### [India to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/india-to-uk)
Sea: 20-28 days | Air: 3-5 days
Origin: Mumbai (Nhava Sheva), Chennai, Mundra, Kolkata

### [USA to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/usa-to-uk)
Sea: 10-15 days | Air: 1-3 days
Origin: New York (NYC/NJ), Los Angeles (LA/LB), Miami, Savannah, Houston

### [Turkey to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/turkey-to-uk)
Sea: 14-20 days | Road: 5-7 days
Origin: Istanbul (Ambarli, Mersin), Izmir

### [UAE to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/uae-to-uk)
Sea: 18-24 days | Air: 2-4 days
Origin: Jebel Ali (Dubai), Abu Dhabi, Sharjah

### [Spain to UK Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/spain-to-uk)
Road: 4-9 days | Sea: 7-12 days
Origin: Barcelona, Valencia, Madrid

### [Belfast & Northern Ireland Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/belfast-northern-ireland)
Belfast to GB: 1-2 days (sea) | Dublin to Belfast: same day (road)
Ports: Belfast Harbour, Larne, Londonderry (Foyle Port)
Specialist in Northern Ireland Protocol and Windsor Framework customs.

### [Dublin & Ireland Freight](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/routes/dublin-ireland)
Dublin to Liverpool: 8 hours (ferry) | Dublin to Holyhead: 2 hours (ferry)
Ports: Dublin Port, Cork, Rosslare Europort, Shannon Foynes, Waterford
Common Travel Area and T1 transit expertise.

## Industries

### [Ecommerce & Amazon](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/ecommerce)
FBA logistics, B2C fulfilment, and Amazon prep services for online retailers.

### [Manufacturing](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/manufacturing)
Raw materials, components, and finished goods shipping for UK manufacturers.

### [Retail & Wholesale](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/retail)
Seasonal stock, bulk imports, and distribution logistics for retailers.

### [Automotive](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/automotive)
Parts, accessories, and vehicle component logistics with just-in-time delivery.

### [Construction Materials](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/construction)
Building materials, fixtures, and heavy equipment forwarding.

### [Furniture](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/furniture)
Flat-pack and assembled furniture shipping from manufacturers to retailers.

### [Electronics](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/electronics)
Consumer electronics and tech product shipping with ESD protection.

### [Medical & Pharmaceutical](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/industries/medical)
Temperature-controlled shipping for medical supplies and pharmaceuticals.

## Freight Tools & Intelligence

### [UK Port Congestion Tracker](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/resources/port-congestion-tracker)
Live status for 18 UK and Ireland ports: Felixstowe, Southampton, London Gateway, Liverpool, Bristol, Tilbury, Immingham, Grangemouth, Holyhead, Belfast, Larne, Londonderry, Dublin, Cork, Rosslare, Shannon Foynes, Waterford.
Updated daily at 06:00 and 18:00 GMT.

### [CBM Calculator](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/tools/cbm-calculator)
Calculate cubic metre volume for sea freight shipments. Supports multiple cartons, pallets, and irregular shapes.

### [Duty & VAT Estimator](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/tools/duty-vat-estimator)
Estimate UK import duty and VAT based on commodity code, origin country, and shipment value.

### [Incoterms Selector](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/tools/incoterms-selector)
Interactive tool to find the right Incoterm for your shipment based on risk, cost, and control preferences.

### [Import Documentation Checklist](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/tools/import-documentation-checklist)
Generate a customised checklist of required documents for your specific import shipment.

### [Port Comparison Tool](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/tools/port-comparison)
Compare health scores, wait times, forecasts and capacity across all 18 UK & Ireland ports.

### [Importer Cost Calculator](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/tools/cost-calculator)
Calculate the real cost of port delays — demurrage, detention, storage & lost sales.

### [Container Size Guide](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/resources/container-size-guide)
20ft, 40ft, 40ft HC and specialised container dimensions and capacity.

### [Incoterms Guide](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/resources/incoterms-guide)
EXW, FOB, CIF, DDP and all 2020 Incoterms explained for UK importers.

### [Post-Brexit Customs Guide](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/resources/post-brexit-customs-guide)
Navigating UK customs after Brexit — EORI, commodity codes, rules of origin and more.

Step-by-step guides for importing and exporting.

Frequently asked questions about freight forwarding, customs and shipping.

Real client success stories and logistics solutions.

### [Our Process](https://www.carrgo.co.uk/resources/our-process)
How Carrgo handles freight from quote to delivery.

## Coverage

- Great Britain (England, Scotland, Wales)
- Northern Ireland (Belfast, Larne, Londonderry)
- Republic of Ireland (Dublin, Cork, Rosslare, Shannon Foynes, Waterford)

## Accreditations

- BIFA (British International Freight Association)
- IATA (International Air Transport Association)
